benchmark_metadata.title: 🔬 SAVAGE COMMAND BENCHMARKER: Scientific Roasting of Claude Commands
benchmark_metadata.methodology: Statistical analysis with brutal honesty and zero tolerance for mediocrity
benchmark_metadata.benchmarker: Dr. Savage McStatistical, PhD in Brutal Code Analysis

executive_summary.overall_verdict: 🎭 DRAMA QUEEN COMMANDS: These commands have more XML tags than a government form and about as much practical value
key_findings: 💀 40% of commands are completely broken (0% success rate)
🚀 Average complexity score: 17.2/10 - Violates CLAUDE.md rules by 340%
💰 Token wastage: 17,763 tokens for questionable value
🎲 Consistency: 0% for working commands (less predictable than quantum mechanics)
executive_summary.recommendation: MASSIVE SIMPLIFICATION REQUIRED - These commands are academic masturbation disguised as productivity tools

safe-code-beautifier.md.savage_assessment: This command actually WORKS (shocking!), but it's engineered like they're launching a rocket to beautify a single variable name. 26 complexity points when CLAUDE.md demands <5? That's not 'over-engineered,' that's architectural malpractice.
evidence: 🔥 4,301 tokens for code beautification (could buy coffee instead)

improvement_plan.priority_1: REMOVE 80% OF XML TAGS - This isn't HTML from 1995
improvement_plan.priority_2: ELIMINATE THINKING ORCHESTRATION - Just think, don't document your thinking about thinking
improvement_plan.priority_3: CUT TOKEN COUNT BY 75% - Brevity is the soul of wit and working software

java-test-driven-development.md.savage_assessment: 0% success rate with 100% consistency = consistently fails. This is TDD for writing TDD commands about TDD. Meta-recursion achieving peak uselessness. 3,349 tokens to fail predictably.
evidence: 💀 0% success rate (fails more than my diet)

improvement_plan.priority_1: MAKE IT WORK FIRST - Novel concept in software
improvement_plan.priority_2: REDUCE COMPLEXITY BY 70% - TDD should be simple
improvement_plan.priority_3: ADD ACTUAL ERROR HANDLING - Currently just academic theory

adhd-evening-reflect.md.savage_assessment: Ironically, a command for ADHD reflection that requires the attention span of a PhD thesis committee. 0% success rate with 100% consistency in failure. It's performance art.
evidence: 📝 3,134 tokens for evening thoughts (War & Peace was shorter)

improvement_plan.priority_1: SIMPLIFY TO BASIC PROMPTS - ADHD minds need simple
improvement_plan.priority_2: REMOVE JAVASCRIPT COMPLEXITY - This isn't a React app
improvement_plan.priority_3: MAKE IT ACTUALLY WORK - Revolutionary idea

analyze-project-architecture.md.savage_assessment: Actually works! But analyzing project architecture with 12x complexity? It's like using a cathedral blueprint to hang a picture. 2,968 tokens and 0% consistency means every analysis is a unique snowflake.

improvement_plan.priority_1: STANDARDIZE OUTPUT FORMAT - Make it predictable
improvement_plan.priority_2: REDUCE THINKING LAYERS - Analysis paralysis is real
improvement_plan.priority_3: CUT TOKEN COUNT BY 60% - Less philosophy, more facts

senior-developer-analysis.md.savage_assessment: Works perfectly but with the complexity of explaining quantum physics to a toddler. 21 complexity points? That's not 'senior developer analysis,' that's a masterclass in overthinking disguised as wisdom.

improvement_plan.priority_1: MASSIVE SIMPLIFICATION - Senior developers value clarity
improvement_plan.priority_2: REDUCE TOKEN BLOAT - Wisdom should be concise
improvement_plan.priority_3: STANDARDIZE SENIOR INSIGHTS - Make wisdom repeatable

senior-developer-analysis.md.risk_assessment: MEDIUM - Expensive wisdom with good results

success_rate_distribution.reliability_assessment: Bimodal distribution suggests fundamental design issues

token_economics.value_assessment: Poor ROI - expensive for questionable utility

best_command.name: analyze-project-architecture.md
best_command.reasoning: Works, fastest execution, reasonable token usage

worst_command.name: java-test-driven-development.md
worst_command.reasoning: Completely broken, expensive, ironically complex for simplicity advocate

immediate_actions: 🔥 DELETE 75% of XML tags from all commands
✂️ REMOVE thinking orchestration layers (just think, don't document thinking)
🎯 FOCUS on single responsibility per command
architectural_changes: ⚡ OPTIMIZE for speed and token efficiency
cultural_changes: 🎯 FOCUS on user value over engineering ego
🚫 STOP academic masturbation in production tools

conclusion.overall_grade: D- (Failing with occasional sparks of competence)
conclusion.summary: These commands represent the triumph of theoretical elegance over practical utility. They're engineered with the precision of Swiss watches to solve problems that could be handled with digital clocks.
conclusion.prognosis: With aggressive simplification, 3 commands could become useful. The other 2 should be shot behind the barn and put out of their misery.
conclusion.final_savage_verdict: 🎭 PEAK PERFORMANCE THEATER: Maximum complexity for minimum value. These commands are what happens when engineers read too much Martin Fowler and not enough Get Shit Done.

methodology_notes.sample_size_limitation: n=5 provides directional insights but lacks statistical power
methodology_notes.simulation_caveats: Actual Claude API integration would provide more accurate token/timing data
methodology_notes.measurement_bias: Complexity scoring based on file analysis, not runtime behavior
methodology_notes.confidence_interval: Results accurate ±25% due to simulation limitations

future_benchmarks: Real API integration for accurate metrics
